scenes.voiceover: Doing nothing is also a choice with a cost.
On one side the saver who waits, on the other the investor who starts; the gap between them only widens.
scenes.visualBrief: Two-column split-screen. Left column labelled 'Saver' with a static piggy bank. Right column labelled 'Investor' with an upward growth arrow. Focal point: a widening gap arrow between the columns. Calm palette, no numbers.
